population_description: Adult patients with FLT3-ITD-positive acute myeloid leukemia in complete hematologic remission after allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation.
Adults with FLT3-ITD AML in first remission who underwent allogeneic hematopoietic cell transplantation (HCT).
intervention_name: Gilteritinib maintenance (120 mg once daily for 24 months)

population_description: Newly diagnosed FLT3-ITD-positive acute myeloid leukemia patients who underwent allogeneic hematopoietic cell transplantation in first complete remission (CR1) or composite CR1 (CRc1).

Adults (18-60 years) with FLT3-ITD acute myeloid leukemia who underwent allogeneic hematopoietic stem-cell transplantation, had composite complete remission before and after transplantation, and hematopoietic recovery within 60 days post-transplantation.
intervention_name: Sorafenib maintenance (400 mg orally twice daily)

population_description: Patients with FLT3-ITD-mutated acute myeloid leukemia (AML) undergoing allogeneic hematopoietic cell transplantation (HCT).
FLT3-mutated acute myeloid leukemia patients who underwent allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation.

Adults aged 18-60 years with FLT3-ITD acute myeloid leukaemia who underwent allogeneic HSCT, had ECOG PS 0-2, composite complete remission before and after transplantation, and hematopoietic recovery within 60 days post-transplant.
Patients with FLT3-ITD acute myeloid leukemia (AML) undergoing allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation.
Adults with relapsed or refractory acute myeloid leukemia (AML) with FLT3-ITD mutation who had undergone allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation.
Adults with FLT3-ITD-mutated acute myeloid leukemia (AML) in complete remission (CR) after allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation (HSCT).
Adults with low-allelic-ratio FLT3-ITD acute myeloid leukemia (AML) who underwent allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplantation (allo-HSCT).
Adults with FLT3-ITD-positive relapsed or refractory acute myeloid leukemia (AML) who underwent allo-HSCT. Median age was 38 (18-65) years.
comparator_name: No gilteritinib maintenance therapy after allo-HSCT
